appnote:
- Fix HTML tags visible in anime descriptions (broken synopsis rendering)
- Fix video stuck on streaming video: emergency AniList fetch when cache cold
- Fix referer headers not applied to HLS streams
- Add 25s timeout for video loading with error toast
- Improve provider fallback when idMal missing
